openFindings.title: Root packet status and continuity point to already-completed work
openFindings.summary: The root still says Research Dispatched and next_safe_action is to dispatch 001 initial research, while the child research artifacts and 002 packet record completed work.

openFindings.title: Default-on plugin rollout lacks an explicit adversarial corpus gate in the packet requirements
openFindings.summary: The research identifies prompt-poisoning and default-on plugin risks, but the root requirements do not turn the adversarial corpus into an acceptance gate for follow-up plugin work.

openFindings.title: Root Level 3 packet is missing required documents and anchors
evidence: validator: missing plan.md, tasks.md, checklist.md, decision-record.md; missing requirements, success-criteria, risks, questions anchors
openFindings.summary: The phase root declares Level 3, but the root contains only spec.md, description.json, and graph-metadata.json. Strict validation fails before child phase results can be treated as the complete packet.

openFindings.title: 001-initial-research declares Level 2 but lacks required scaffolding and structured anchors
evidence: validator: 001 missing plan.md, tasks.md, checklist.md; no ANCHOR tags; missing core Level 2 template sections
openFindings.summary: The initial research phase has research artifacts, but its Level 2 packet shell is incomplete and fails recursive validation.

openFindings.title: Root graph metadata indexes only spec.md and omits completed child evidence
openFindings.summary: The root graph knows about children but exposes only spec.md as key/source doc, so memory retrieval at the phase root misses research.md, research-validation.md, checklist, and implementation-summary evidence.

openFindings.title: Migrated identity still mixes 021 and 004 numbering surfaces
openFindings.summary: The packet path and specId are now 004, but root trigger phrases and the child parentChain still expose 021, increasing lookup and resume ambiguity after the renumbering.

openFindings.title: Implementation summary records strict validation without an explicit pass result
evidence: validator: current recursive validation exits 2 for the phase root
openFindings.summary: The 002 summary says strict spec validation was rerun, but does not record PASS/FAIL evidence. The current root validation failure makes this ambiguous for later completion claims.

openFindings.title: Root corpus reference resolves to a missing path after migration
evidence: path check: ../research/019-system-hardening-pt-03 from the root resolves under 006-search-routing-advisor/research and is missing
openFindings.summary: The root spec cites a corpus path that no longer resolves from the migrated location, even though the child synthesis depends on that corpus.

openFindings.title: Code-graph plugin reference remains TBD after the research resolved it
openFindings.summary: The root spec still says the code-graph plugin reference is TBD, while the initial research names the concrete plugin and bridge files.

openFindings.title: Follow-up recommendations are not mapped to owning packets or tasks
openFindings.summary: The synthesis has useful recommendations, but they are not linked to concrete follow-up packets or task owners, so they can be lost during future resume or planning flows.
